meaning: n.牢固,固定(性),不褪色(性),放荡,僻静的处所,抗(毒)性,要塞,巩固
examples: They could have withdrawn into the mountain fastness of Eryri.
We guarantee the fastness of these dyes.
The bandits withdrew to their mountain fastness for the winter.
Indeed, diplomats who have visited them in the remote mountain fastness of their new capital, Naypyidaw, say they are even more confident.
